case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GRAHAM, EARLINE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-26-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-10-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $984.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, EARLINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
